name: paper
description: /paper <args> — arxiv-style LaTeX paper scaffolder. Verbs: new <slug> (scaffold the rich template — 9-section spine with §Full Pipeline tier table, hexa-codex-style author block, BLUE-MAX appendix stub, companion/ data-record dir, fig01 matplotlib + fig02 TikZ line + fig03 TikZ pipeline + cover prompt-design guide) · sample <slug> · fig <size> <prompt> <out.png> (delegates to sister `imagine` plugin → fal.ai `openai/gpt-image-2`) · compile [dir] (xelatex × 3 + bibtex — emoji-native, kills the pdflatex tier-emoji fatal) · lint [dir] (extended commons @D g51 — ≥10 pages + ≥1 fal.ai figure + §Pipeline/§Limitations/§Reproducibility present + ≥1 table + ≥2 figures + ≥10 bibtex entries + no tier emoji in references.bib + cite-key resolution warn-list) · list · help. Template ships ready-to-compile end-to-end. companion/ provides verify-ledger.json + pr-roll.json + session-journal.md + adapter-defect-catalog.json. Makefile adds wordcount · pages · lint · arxiv-tar · figures-clean targets.
